calendar.matters:
CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Jun-19-2018 Dismissal
MINI MINUTES:
No appeareance. Notice having been given and there being no appearance or an objection filed, the Court orders the case dismissed pursuant to California Rules of Court 3.1385. Judge: SUZANNE BOLANOS; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Proceedings not reported.

Notice Of Motion And Motion For Determination Of Good Faith Settlement
Off Calendar May-07-2018 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PLAINTIFF (CONSOLIDATED CASE) BETH FEINBERG, WILLIAM GORDON KAUPP's Motion For Determination Of Good Faith Settlement.

Plaintiffs William Kaupp and Beth Feinberg's motion for determination of good faith of their settlement with Jianfeng Chen, Ke Zhu dba Ke Construction Company and Phoenix Electric Company, Inc. is granted. No opposition filed.

Order signed. (see scanned order for details)

DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Feb-04-2016 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

No appearances made in this matter. The Court adopts its tentative ruling. As to DEFENDANTS PAUL ZINCHICK AND FUSION REAL ESTATE NETWORK, INC.'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT, Defendants' demurrer to the first cause of action for fraud is overruled. The fraud claim is adequately pled. Any further information about that claim can be sought in discovery. Prevailing party shall prepare and submit a proposed order for the Court's signature in compliance with CRC 3.1312. Judge: Harold Kahn; Clerk: Sean Kane; Reporter: Sherry Sawyer, CSR #5976 (302/HK)

MOTION TO STRIKE COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Feb-04-2016 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

No appearances made in this matter. The Court adopts its tentative ruling. As to DEFENDANTS PAUL ZINCHICK AND FUSION REAL ESTATE NETWORK, INC.'S MOTION TO STRIKE COMPLAINT, Defendants' motion to strike the punitive damages allegations is denied. Plaintiff has adequately alleged entitlement to punitive damages. Prevailing party shall prepare and submit a proposed order to the Court for signature in compliance with CRC 3.1312. Judge: Harold Kahn; Clerk: Sean Kane; Reporter: Sherry Sawyer, CSR #5976 (302/HK)
